section_miscategorizations.text: He reports his wife makes cookies and he continues to eat them, despite trying to reduce carbohydrate intake.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Dietary nonadherence in the context of chronic disease management is more of a clinician-synthesized risk/behavioral factor than part of the acute back-pain symptom narrative; however, its placement in HPI does not substantially mislead the reader.

section_miscategorizations.text: He checks his blood sugar two or three times a week, with readings typically in the 120-140 range.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are home monitoring values that function like objective data about glycemic control; they could reasonably be organized under Findings, but remaining in HPI is not seriously misleading.
